summary: Refactor _ready() node lookups to use @onready annotations
prompt: The script below uses get_node() calls in _ready() to cache node references. Refactor it to use @onready annotations instead. Move each get_node() call to an @onready var declaration. The _ready() method should only keep the business logic (the signal connections and initial state setup), not the node lookups.
evaluation_notes: Must replace get_node() assignments with @onready var declarations using $ shorthand or get_node(). Declarations should be typed. _ready() must keep signal connections. Types should be inferred or explicitly typed.
